meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build a standout developer portfolio. A practical guide for intermediate students.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by building high-impact, functional AI applications. By leveraging the Antigravity project template paired with Claude Code, you can rapidly architect, deploy, and showcase production-grade code. Stop building tutorials; start shipping real-world tools that demonstrate technical mastery and solve genuine user problems for your portfolio.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the silence of your GitHub profile echoing the pressure of the job market. Every recruiter wants experience, but you can’t get experience without a project, and you can’t get a project without the confidence that you’re building something that actually matters.

It’s time to break the cycle. We aren’t building another to-do list; we are deploying a sophisticated, AI-driven architecture. By using the Antigravity project template, you gain a professional-grade scaffolding that mimics high-scale SaaS environments, allowing you to skip the boilerplate and dive straight into solving complex engineering challenges.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Set up the Antigravity template to establish a professional architecture that handles authentication, database connections, and API routing out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity secure-SaaS template with TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Next.js app router.

steps.title: Define the Domain Model
steps.description: Create a robust schema that reflects real-world data structures, ensuring your project demonstrates database design knowledge.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational schema for a multi-tenant AI dashboard, including tables for Users, Projects, and Analytics logs with proper foreign key constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name init_schema'

steps.title: Integrate AI Logic Layer
steps.description: Inject intelligent functionality using the template's built-in AI service layer to showcase advanced API orchestration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI service handler that processes user input, interacts with the OpenAI API, and streams the response back to the client.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Security
steps.description: Demonstrate enterprise-level security by implementing middleware that protects sensitive API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add middleware to protect /api/admin routes, ensuring only authenticated users with an 'admin' role can access the analytics dashboard.

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Push your code to a live environment, transforming your local repository into a shareable portfolio asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration file for Vercel and include a README.md that highlights the architectural decisions made.

pro_tips: Always commit your architectural decisions in the README to show recruiters your 'Why' behind the 'How'.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your edge cases; it’s the fastest way to prove code reliability to hiring managers.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific user pain point rather than bloating the app with generic features.
Leverage the Antigravity template's built-in logging to create an 'Admin Dashboard' view—it looks incredibly professional on a portfolio.
Perform a final refactor with Claude to reduce cyclomatic complexity; clean, readable code is more impressive than 'clever' code.
content.next_steps: After deploying, write a blog post detailing one complex bug you fixed during the build process and link it in your GitHub repository.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to prove your skills. Build the project that lands you the interview today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
